plugin.name: Scan for Mobile Access
plugin.description: Create a controlled temporary mobile access entry for N.E.K.O.
plugin.short_description: Create a temporary QR-code mobile access entry for N.E.K.O.
panel.toast.manualMobileMode: The phone has opened the page. To avoid keeping the desktop main page and phone page open at the same time, switch to mobile mode manually from the system tray menu.
panel.toast.starting: Starting mobile sharing. Getting the public link may take a moment.
panel.title: Scan for Mobile Access
panel.subtitle: Temporarily create a controlled mobile browser entry.
panel.warning.public: Public access is enabled. Share it only with trusted devices and stop it when finished.
panel.warning.cache: Cache note: this temporary public link may change to a new address each time sharing restarts. Your mobile browser may treat the new address as a new site and download resources again. If storage grows after use, clear the related temporary site's cache or site data in the mobile browser settings.
panel.share.description: Starting creates a temporary HTTPS link and QR code. After confirmation, it opens the native project page.
panel.confirm.stop: Stop the current public mobile access entry?
panel.toast.copyFailed: Copy failed. Show the link and copy it manually.
panel.details.title: Connection Details
panel.details.note: After confirmation, the browser enters the native project page and adapts to mobile screen size automatically.
actions.start.label: Start Sharing
actions.stop.label: Stop Sharing
actions.stop.confirm: Stop the current public mobile access entry?
actions.rotate.label: Rotate QR Code
entries.start.name: Start Mobile Sharing
entries.start.description: Start the local mobile gateway and generate a QR-code access link.
entries.stop.name: Stop Mobile Sharing
entries.stop.description: Stop the temporary public link and the local mobile gateway.
entries.rotate.name: Rotate QR Code
entries.rotate.description: Reset the access token so the old QR code immediately becomes invalid.
entries.status.name: Get Sharing Status
entries.status.description: Get the current mobile QR tunnel status.
entries.vendor.name: Check Bundled cloudflared
entries.vendor.description: Check whether the bundled cloudflared.exe and license records exist.
messages.ready: Plugin is ready. The sharing entry has not started.
messages.qrRotated: QR code rotated. The old link is no longer valid.
messages.idleStopped: No phone confirmed entry for {minutes} minutes, so the sharing entry was closed automatically.
messages.statusIdle: Mobile scan access is not running.
errors.bundledHashFailedUser: Bundled cloudflared.exe hash check failed. Please restore the plugin files.
errors.tunnelNotRunningRotate: The sharing entry is not running, so the QR code cannot be rotated.
errors.gatewayNoPort: Local mobile gateway failed to start: no listening port was assigned.
errors.gatewayNotStarted: Local mobile gateway has not started.
errors.startTimeout: cloudflared timed out before returning an access link.
mobile.invalid.useQr: Use the full QR-code link from the plugin panel.
mobile.invalid.expiredFull: This link is no longer valid. Return to the desktop panel and rotate the QR code.
mobile.invalid.expiredShort: This link is no longer valid.
mobile.invalid.sessionExpired: The access session is missing or expired. Scan the QR code again.
mobile.page.title: N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.page.heading: N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.title: Confirm N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.heading: Confirm N.E.K.O Mobile Access
mobile.confirm.body: You are accessing this computer through a temporary link. Confirm this is your own device before entering the mobile page.
mobile.idle.label: Idle auto stop
mobile.accessType.label: Access type
mobile.hint: If you do not recognize this entry, close the page and stop sharing from the desktop plugin panel.
mobile.cacheTip: Cache note: this temporary link may change to a new address each time sharing restarts. Your mobile browser may treat the new address as a new site and download resources again. If storage grows after use, clear the related temporary site cache or site data in browser settings.
